exam_price_notes: Approximately AUD $900 (~USD $600); fees vary by enrolment period. Check CA ANZ website for current fees.
id_requirements: CA ANZ account login required. Government-issued photo ID may be required for online proctored exams. Check the CA ANZ candidate handbook for current requirements.
exam_rules: CA Program exams are delivered online (change made permanent following COVID-19). Exams are 3 hours each. Open-book rules vary by subject; check the current CA ANZ candidate guide. Candidates must be enrolled in the CA Program and have an active CA ANZ student membership. Three years of mentored work experience must be completed alongside the academic program to be awarded the CA designation.
renewal_options: The CA designation does not expire once awarded. Annual CA ANZ membership fees must be maintained. Continuing Professional Development (CPD) requirements apply to maintain good standing: 120 CPD hours per 3-year rolling period, including 20 hours of verifiable CPD per year.

prerequisites.description: Required for candidates without an accredited accounting degree. Candidates with an accredited degree may be exempt.

retake_policy.notes: Failed subjects can be retaken in subsequent study periods. Fees apply for each attempt. Contact CA ANZ for current retake policies and maximum attempt limits.

domains.name: Accounting Principles and the Conceptual Framework

official_study_resources.title: CA ANZ Learning Materials (online modules, workshops)
